commit.message: Get rid of extra matrix values.
Apply matrix to all input for testing.
Only use root for install for weston.
Added weston.ini config and setup claibration script.
I am dumb ignore the last commit.
Added required dependencies for headless rendering.
Added sudo requirements and input to reboot.
Got rid of non-existent switch and added kiosk shell back.
